summary: A comprehensive health insurance plan that rewards customers for staying healthy with moneyback and loyalty benefits. The plan offers premium payback if no claims are made for 5 consecutive years, unlimited cumulative bonus, and various wellness benefits. It provides coverage up to sum insured for various medical expenses including in-patient care, day care treatment, pre and post hospitalization expenses, AYUSH treatment, and domiciliary hospitalization.
coverage: In-Patient Care up to Sum Insured
Day Care Treatment - All day care procedures up to Sum Insured
Advance Technology Methods up to Sum Insured
Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses - 60 days prior to hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses - 90 days after discharge up to Sum Insured
AYUSH Treatment up to Sum Insured
Domiciliary Hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Cover up to Sum Insured
Ambulance Cover up to Sum Insured - Any mode of transport such as Road/Air/Train/Boat
Room Rent up to Sum Insured
ICU Cover up to Sum Insured
New Born coverage with wait period as per current policy if added within 90 days of birth
Unlimited Care - Specified list of items (list I, II, III and IV) that are non-payable shall be covered up to Sum Insured
Physical consultations with General Physicians up to ₹5,000 per insured, with limit of ₹500 per consultation
Maximum 4 physical consultations per insured per policy year with general physicians subject to maximum ₹500 per consultation
Maximum 4 physical consultations per insured per policy year with listed specialist doctors subject to maximum ₹500 per consultation
Grace Period Coverage - Policy remains active during grace period with hospitalization expenses benefit
waiting_periods: Initial waiting period: 30 days (not applicable on accident cases)
PED Wait Period Modification: 1 year/2 years for specified conditions

No PED wait period for Diabetes/Hypertension/Hyperlipidemia/Asthma/Obesity/Hypothyroidism/Coronary Artery Disease (PTCA prior 1 year) - Coverage starts from 31st day after serving initial wait period of 30 days
room_rent: Room Rent covered up to Sum Insured
claims_information: Automatic Recharge available for unlimited times for unrelated or same illness from subsequent claim
Tenure Multiplier - Combine annual Sum Insured of multi-year policy for a single claim in a policy tenure
Any one claim during lifetime of policy payable without any sum insured limit under Unlimited Care benefit
Company awarded 'Best Claim Settlement Company of The Year' at 9th Annual India Insurance Summit & Awards 2025

faqs.question: What is the MoneyBack benefit?
faqs.answer: If no hospitalization related claim is made for 5 consecutive policy years, the 1st policy year base premium shall be refunded in every block of 5 years subject to subsequent renewal of policy. Base premium excludes optional benefits and taxes.

faqs.question: What is the Infinity Bonus benefit?
faqs.answer: This benefit provides 100% of Base Sum Insured per year irrespective of claims made for unlimited times on continuous renewal of policy. The bonus doesn't reduce in case of claim and doesn't limit the cumulative bonus.

faqs.question: What is the Loyalty Boost benefit?
faqs.answer: An additional sum insured equal to the first policy year's sum insured will be added to the policy coverage after 7 consecutive claim-free years, once in a policy lifetime. Waiting period shall be waived off for this additional sum insured.

faqs.question: What is the Welcome Discount?
faqs.answer: New policy buyers get up to 30% discount on premium. The discount is available for the first 3 years - 30% discount in first year, 20% discount in second year and 10% discount in 3rd year.

faqs.question: What are MediVouchers?
faqs.answer: Two pharmacy vouchers worth ₹250 each per policy are provided on 1st renewal with the company to ease out-of-pocket expenses and make medical expenses more affordable.

faqs.question: What is the Wellness Discount?
faqs.answer: You can enjoy up to 30% discount on renewal premiums with healthy days program on Care Health Customer App. The discount is based on number of days completing 10,000 steps (8,000 steps for insured person aged 60 years and above).

faqs.question: What are the sum insured options available?
faqs.answer: Sum insured options available are ₹5 Lakh, ₹7 Lakh, ₹10 Lakh, ₹15 Lakh, ₹20 Lakh, ₹25 Lakh, ₹50 Lakh, and ₹1 Crore on annual basis.

faqs.question: What is the entry age for this policy?
faqs.answer: Minimum entry age is 18 years for adults and 91 days for children. For adults, there is no upper age limit, and for children, maximum entry age is 24 years (last birthday).

faqs.question: What is the exit age for this policy?
faqs.answer: For adults, coverage is lifelong. For children, exit age is 25 years.

faqs.question: What are the tenure options available?
faqs.answer: Tenure options are available up to 5 years.

faqs.question: Who can be covered under this policy?
faqs.answer: Self, Spouse/Live-in partner/Same sex partner, Son, Daughter, Father, Mother, Mother-in-law, Father-in-law, Grand-Father, Grand-Mother and as per insurable interest can be covered.

faqs.question: What is the maximum number of persons that can be covered?
faqs.answer: Individual coverage: Maximum up to 6 persons. Floater coverage: Maximum up to 2 Adults and 2 Children (2A2C).

faqs.question: What is covered under pre-hospitalization expenses?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization medical expenses are covered up to sum insured for 60 days prior to hospitalization.

faqs.question: What is covered under post-hospitalization expenses?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalization medical expenses are covered up to sum insured for 90 days after discharge.

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered up to sum insured.

faqs.question: What is the cumulative bonus benefit?
faqs.answer: Cumulative bonus of 50% of Base Sum Insured per year is provided irrespective of claim, maximum up to 100%. The bonus shall not reduce in case of claim.

faqs.question: How does the wellness benefit work?
faqs.answer: The wellness benefit includes recording 10,000 steps (8,000 steps for insured aged 60+ years) daily, access to Digital Fitness Coaching, AI Fitness Coaching, and Nutritionist/Wellness Coach. Benefits b, c & d are available for insured members aged above 12 years.

faqs.question: What is the Annual Health Check up benefit?
faqs.answer: Annual Health Check up benefit is available once for all insured every policy year.

faqs.question: How many e-consultations are covered?
faqs.answer: Unlimited e-consultations are available for consultations with general physicians and specialists.

faqs.question: What is the Grace Period Coverage?
faqs.answer: Your policy remains active ensuring continuous protection during the grace period. Only coverage under hospitalization expenses benefit shall be provided during this period.

faqs.question: How is the wellness discount calculated?
faqs.answer: Discount is based on healthy days: 270+ days = 30%, 240+ days = 20%, 180+ days = 15%, 120+ days = 10%, Less than 120 days = 0%. Days are counted based on completing 10,000 steps (8,000 for 60+ age).

faqs.question: What conditions have modified PED wait periods?
faqs.answer: Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Asthma, Obesity, Hypothyroidism, and Coronary Artery Disease (PTCA prior 1 year) have modified PED wait periods of 1-2 years instead of standard 36 months.

faqs.question: When does coverage start for pre-existing diseases with modified wait periods?
faqs.answer: For specified pre-existing diseases, coverage starts from the 31st day of policy start date after serving initial wait period of 30 days.

faqs.question: What is the Unlimited Care benefit?
faqs.answer: Specified list of items (list I, II, III and IV) that are normally non-payable shall be covered up to the sum insured under this benefit.

faqs.question: How does the Tenure Multiplier work?
faqs.answer: It allows you to combine annual sum insured of multi-year policy for a single claim in a policy tenure. Only one claim is payable in the entire policy term under this benefit.

faqs.question: What zones are covered for pricing?
faqs.answer: Zone 1: Delhi NCR, Surat, Mathura, Aligarh; Zone 1A: Telangana, Mumbai (MMR), Ahmedabad, Vadodara, Nashik; Zone 2: Pune, Indore, Bengaluru Urban, Rest of Gujarat; Zone 3: Rest of India.
